---

title: "D04_09: Precision Feature Preparation (All)"
subtitle: "Aggregate product features for precision Poisson analysis"
parent: "D04_poisson_marketing"
chapter: "CH12"
category: "derivation-task"
number: "D04_09"
date-created: "2025-12-24"
date-modified: "2025-12-30"
author: "Claude"
type: "derivation-task"
depends_on: []
outputs_to:
  - "processed_data.df_precision_features"
implements:
  - script: "all_D04_09.R"
    path: "update_scripts/DRV/all/"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: false
---

# D04_09: Precision Feature Preparation (All) {#overview}

This task aggregates product features across all product lines into a single
table for cross-platform Poisson analysis.

## Implementation Scripts

| Platform | Script | Location | Output |
|----------|--------|----------|--------|
| All | `all_D04_09.R` | `update_scripts/DRV/all/` | `processed_data.df_precision_features` |

## Inputs

- `transformed_data.transformed_precision_{product_line}` (ETL 2TR outputs)

## Task Definition (NSQL)

```nsql
AGGREGATE D04_09_precision_features:
  UNION ALL transformed_data.transformed_precision_{product_line}
  GROUP BY product_line, country
  CALCULATE summary_metrics
  OUTPUT TO processed_data.df_precision_features
```

## Outputs

- `processed_data.df_precision_features`

## Notes

- Aggregation is metadata-heavy (MP102) and uses only real ETL outputs (MP029).
- Designed to support D04_08 precision Poisson regression.

## Next Task

Proceed to [D04_08: Precision Poisson Analysis](D04_08_precision_poisson_analysis.qmd).
